basic_details.job_title: NGEL Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 114 Deputy General Manager, Assistant Manager Posts
basic_details.post_name: Deputy General Manager (RE), Assistant Manager (RE & Finance)
basic_details.short_information: NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL), a subsidiary of NTPC Ltd., has released a new recruitment notification for experienced professionals in the renewable energy sector for 2026. The organization is aiming to strengthen its operations in Solar, Wind, and Green Energy projects across India.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 11 July 2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 31 July 2026

age_limit.age_details: Up to 44 Years (DGM), Up to 40 Years (AM)

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Engineer - RE (Asset Management/ Operation & Maintenance)

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Assistant Engineer - RE (Asset Management/ Operation & Maintenance)

category_wise_vacancy.Post Name: Assistant Engineer - RE (Asset Management/ Operation & Maintenance)

how_to_apply: Register using valid email ID and mobile number
Submit and take printout for reference

faq.question: Q1. What is NGEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NGEL Recruitment 2026 is a hiring process by NTPC Green Energy Limited to recruit experienced professionals for renewable energy and finance-related positions.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in NGEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The available posts include Deputy General Manager (Renewable Energy) and Assistant Engineer/Manager roles in Renewable Energy and Finance domains.

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies in NGEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 114 vacancies have been announced for different posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the starting date to apply online?
faq.answer: The online application starts from 11 July 2026 (10:00 AM).

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for NGEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 31 July 2026 (till 6:00 PM).

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates should have B.E/B.Tech in relevant engineering fields or CA/CMA for finance-related posts.
